diagrams.title: System Call Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the path of a system call from user application to kernel and back
diagrams.purpose: Understand how user programs request OS services through controlled interface

diagrams.title: Dual Mode Operation States
diagrams.description: Two-state diagram showing transitions between user mode and kernel mode
diagrams.purpose: Visualize protection mechanism that prevents unauthorized hardware access

diagrams.title: OS Boot Process Timeline
diagrams.description: Sequential flow of boot process from power-on to login
diagrams.purpose: Remember the complete sequence of events during computer startup

diagrams.title: Kernel Architecture Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of Monolithic vs Microkernel vs Hybrid structures
diagrams.purpose: Compare different OS architectural approaches and their trade-offs
